title: better end crystal
description: the pack makes crystals look better
body:
this texture pack makes crystals look better

**FEATURES**

1. 64x64 crystal

2. 3d crystal item!


![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd8763e8be1f110cc449c2c53478c1fa0f67f32b.png)

**WHY SHOULD YOU DOWNLOAD THIS TEXTURE PACK?**

If your a crystal pvper then you look at crystals a lot so this texture pack makes crystals look way better and smoother.
